mainEntity.name: Pre-existing AI policy at firm blamed for sanctions?

acceptedAnswer.text: Personal duty remains; firm policy insufficient.[1]
acceptedAnswer.description: Doesn't absolve; personal duty to verify per Rule 11. Levidow firm jointly liable.[1] Key factors: training adequacy, individual acts. Update policy, train. Liability shared.
